name: QriptoCENT Constitutional Corpus
description: A SUB-CORPUS under the IRL Financial Services foundation (PRD-MPY-001 §3.5, D6, ratified 2026-07-21). Source material from which Agent MoneyPenny's FS Invariant Library (inv.finance.*, proposed) is DERIVED by the Invariant Discovery Engine (CFS-048) — never hand-authored. In the Discovery Engine scope ladder this is the `finance/qriptocent` sub-domain under the `finance` domain. QriptoCENT = the protocol/micro-stablecoin; Q¢ (Q-cent) = its cent-unit pricing surface ($1 = 100 Q¢). The corpus CONTENT is operator-provided/ingested via the Discovery Engine (D2) — this scaffold establishes structure only; no source is invented in the interim.
